issues.title: Node.js engine is missing
issues.description: The package.json file does not define engines.node.

issues.title: TypeScript ESLint is not configured
issues.description: typescript-eslint was not detected in the ESLint configuration.

issues.title: LICENSE file is missing
issues.description: The project does not contain a LICENSE file.

issues.title: Package license is not specified
issues.description: The package.json file does not contain a valid SPDX license identifier.

issues.title: Package license missing
issues.description: package.json does not contain a license field.

issues.title: Package manager is missing
issues.description: The package.json file does not define the packageManager field.

issues.title: README is too short
issues.description: Consider expanding the README with more project documentation.

issues.title: Installation section missing
issues.description: Add an Installation section to README.

issues.title: Usage section missing
issues.description: Add a Usage section to README.

issues.title: License section missing
issues.description: Add a License section to README.

issues.title: Contributing section missing
issues.description: Add a Contributing section to README.

issues.title: Repository is missing
issues.description: The package.json file does not define the repository field.

issues.title: Missing "test" script
issues.description: package.json does not define the "test" script.

issues.title: Strict mode is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.strict.

issues.title: noImplicitAny is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noImplicitAny.

issues.title: noUnusedLocals is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noUnusedLocals.

issues.title: Enable compilerOptions.noUnusedParameters.
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noUnusedParameters.

issues.title: noUncheckedIndexedAccess is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noUncheckedIndexedAccess.

issues.title: exactOptionalPropertyTypes is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.exactOptionalPropertyTypes.

issues.title: isolatedModules is disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.isolatedModules.

issues.title: Strict mode disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.strict.

issues.title: noImplicitAny disabled
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noImplicitAny.

issues.title: Unused locals are not checked
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noUnusedLocals.

issues.title: Unused parameters are not checked
issues.description: Enable compilerOptions.noUnusedParameters.

issues.title: Filename casing check disabled
issues.description: Enable forceConsistentCasingInFileNames.

issues.title: skipLibCheck disabled
issues.description: Consider enabling skipLibCheck for faster builds.

recommendations.title: Specify the supported Node.js version
recommendations.description: Add an engines.node field to package.json (for example: ">=22") so contributors and CI use a supported Node.js version.

recommendations.title: Add a LICENSE file
recommendations.description: Create a LICENSE file in the project root that matches the license declared in package.json.

recommendations.title: Specify an SPDX license
recommendations.description: Set the package.json license field to a valid SPDX identifier such as MIT, Apache-2.0 or GPL-3.0-or-later.

recommendations.title: Specify an SPDX license
recommendations.description: Set the package.json license field to a valid SPDX identifier such as MIT, Apache-2.0 or GPL-3.0-or-later.

recommendations.title: Specify the package manager
recommendations.description: Add the packageManager field to package.json to ensure contributors and CI use the same package manager version (for example: npm@11, pnpm@10, yarn@4 or bun@1).

recommendations.title: Add "test" script
recommendations.description: Add a "test" entry to the scripts section of package.json.

recommendations.title: Improve TypeScript configuration
recommendations.description: Consider enabling skipLibCheck for faster builds.
